candidates.why: Represents the bank’s total top-line revenue; explicitly labeled and aggregates main income streams.
Component of revenue but not the primary aggregate; used as backup per revenue priority rule.
Another revenue component; secondary backup if the main total is missing for some years.
Subtotal of non-interest income/expense; can serve as a lower-priority fallback measure of revenue-related activity.

candidates.row_label: ECC Ratio (Income Statement - Norwegian Banks only)
candidates.why: A ratio, not a revenue measure; should not be used for REVT.
Balance sheet asset, not a revenue line; not suitable for REVT.

variables.notes: Total Revenue is the explicit top-line. Additional revenue components are included as lower-priority fallbacks per the revenue rule.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Classified as SG&A labor costs, not direct cost of goods sold for a bank.
Overhead/administrative cost, not COGS, especially in a banking context.
Generic operating expense bucket; for banks this is overhead, not direct COGS.
Direct offset to fee income but in banking is typically not treated as COGS in PROF framework.
Balance sheet liability, not an income statement COGS item.

variables.notes: This is a bank; there is no clear cost-of-goods-sold or cost-of-sales line. Candidate rows are SG&A or other operating costs, which should not be used as COGS under the provided rules.

candidates.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses
candidates.why: Clearly a personnel/SG&A component and part of overhead.
Explicit administrative expenses; conceptually SG&A, even if preview values are nan.
Likely includes other overhead operating costs; appropriate as SG&A component for a bank.
This is income, not an SG&A expense; should be excluded for XSGA_COMPONENTS.

final_choice.row_label: Labor & Related Expenses in Selling, General & Administrative Expenses

variables.notes: Selected the main overhead expense components and excluded income and totals, in line with SG&A rules.
No research & development-related line appears in the provided statements; XRD is treated as 0.

candidates.why: Interest income, not interest expense; should not be primary XINT.
Balance sheet item, not the P&L interest expense line.

candidates.row_label: Debt incurred on the issue of securities (excl. accrued interest)
candidates.why: Principal amount of debt, not interest expense.
Principal amount of subordinated debt, not interest expense.
Explicit total interest expense for the business; best match for XINT.

candidates.row_label: Net Interest Income before Loan Loss Provisions - Total
candidates.why: Net interest income, not pure expense; should not be used for XINT.
Balancing item, not specifically interest expense.
Subtotal of non-interest items; not interest expense.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Net Income available to Controlling Interest
candidates.why: Balancing item, unrelated to interest expense.

variables.notes: Used the explicit interest expense line as the single priority source for XINT.

candidates.why: An asset investment in equities, not shareholders’ equity of the reporting entity.
A component of equity but not the full book equity.
Represents total shareholders’ equity of the parent; best match for book equity (excluding any non-controlling interests).
Appears numerically identical to Shareholders' Equity - Total; more generic but redundant.
Balancing line, not actual equity amount to use.

candidates.row_label: Balancing Item - Total Liability and Equity
candidates.why: Balancing line, not equity.
Total balance sheet size, not equity.

variables.notes: Chose Shareholders' Equity - Total as the book equity attributable to owners; there is no separate non-controlling interest line.
No line for non-controlling interests or minority interest appears on the balance sheet; MIB is set to 0.
